calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Engler for and with Elisa Engler (Executor).

The Court's concerns are: 1) Two unauthorized $100,000 distributions were made. 2) Seeking statutory compensation for both the executor and the attorney that they are daughter and father that worked in the same office. Ms. Engler apologized to the Court and stated the reason for the distributions. Furthermore, she addressed the issue with regard to statutory compensation for her as the executor, that she does not work for her father and she has no access to the firm's money. She is an independent contractor that gets pay for her service and that this issue has not come up in the past. Mr. Engler stated that he did the attorney's work and there is no dual compensation. The two issues were taken under submission and the other reliefs will be granted.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)
